nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kai Kecil white-eye
nodes.summary: Kai Kecil white-eye（Zosterops uropygialis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Kai Kecil white-eye。

nodes.name: Kai Kecil white-eye
nodes.summary: The Kai Kecil white-eye (Zosterops uropygialis), also known as the golden-bellied white-eye, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is native to the Kai Islands in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
